## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`cd tests && npm test`)
- [ ] **If modifying skill descriptions:** verified routing correctness with integration tests (`npm run test:integration <skill>`)
- [ ] **If modifying skill `USE FOR` / `DO NOT USE FOR` / `PREFER OVER` clauses:** confirmed no routing regressions for competing skills (see [#1599](https://github.com/microsoft/GitHub-Copilot-for-Azure/issues/1599))
- [ ] Version bumped in skill frontmatter (if skill files changed)
